error.generic: Diambu mosi ke salamene. Meka diaka.
error.sessionExpired: Ntangu na nge me manisa. Kota diaka.

home.welcomeSubtitle: Sosa, verifika mpe tala bimbangi ya siantifiki ya bafamasi bandwisu na RDC.
home.searchHint: Nkumbu, license to nimero ya ordre...

placeholder.title: Ke kwiza kulanda
placeholder.candidacyBody: Kutinda demande na application ya telefone ke kwiza na mise a jour yankaka. Nge lenda tinda demande na site VALIDIKA.

auth.loginSubtitle: Kota na compte na nge ya VALIDIKA
auth.registerSubtitle: Kwisa na VALIDIKA na bisekondi fioti
auth.name: Nkumbu ya mvimba
auth.passwordHint: Bisono 12 na se fioti, na majuscule, minuscule, chiffre mpe symbole
auth.verifyEmailSubtitle: Tula code ya bisiku 6 yina tindisu na email na nge.
auth.registerSuccess: Compte me salama mbote. Nge lenda kota.

pharmacists.searchHint: Nkumbu, license, nimero ya ordre, mbanza...
pharmacists.noResults: Kutoto famasi ke fwana ve na kisosila na nge.

verify.title: Verification ya bantu yonso
verify.inputLabel: QR token, nimero ya license to nimero ya ordre
verify.scanInstructions: Tula QR code ya mfamasi na kati ya cadre.
verify.resultNotFound: Kima ve me monana mu code yayi.
verify.resultCompromised: Kimbangi me bebisama: bibuka ke fwana ve ye signature yina bumbama.
verify.lastCheckedAt: Verification ya nsuka na internet kilumbu ya {}

account.title: Compte na mono
account.notLoggedIn: Kota mu baka profil na nge ye bandemande na nge.
account.logoutConfirmBody: Nge ta lombama kukota diaka mu baka compte na nge.
account.noCandidacies: Nge me tinda ve ata demande mosi.

candidacy.title: Tinda demande
candidacy.subtitle: Kota na liste ya bafamasi ya RDC na bisekondi fioti.
candidacy.scanCta: Scanner mukanda (carte pro, diplome, pieces d'identite)
candidacy.scanSuccess: Nkumbu me fulusuka banda na mukanda ya scan. Tala mbote na ntwala ya tinda.
candidacy.scanEmpty: Kima ve me monana automatiquement. Fulusa nge mosi.
candidacy.submitSuccess: Demande me tindama mbote! Nge lenda landa statut na ye na compte na nge.
